selection_rule.description: Choose the late-stage physics checkpoint that maximizes mean validation TSS; test is reported once and is not used for selection.
selection_rule.lambda_phys: Training must follow `lambda_phys_schedule` in the locked YAML (physics loss inactive then ramped; final segment uses λ_phys = 0.20 at normalized time 1.0). Selection is only among runs that use this schedule.

candidate_steps.rationale: Late window only: last part of Stage 2 after physics is fully on, matching eval_every=1000 checkpoints in that range.

metric_on_validation.name: mean_tss
metric_on_validation.definition: Arithmetic mean of validation TSS at horizons 6h, 12h, and 24h at that step.
metric_on_validation.thresholds: Distance-to-corner (D2C) operating points computed on the validation split only, as in training evaluation.

selection_rule.tie_break: If two steps tie on mean validation TSS within floating tolerance, break on higher 24h validation TSS; if those tie, prefer the earlier step in the window.
selection_rule.test_set: Held-out test metrics are computed once for the selected step; thresholds stay frozen from validation.
